name: ExtensionEvidence_CiteAs
title: R5: Citation for this evidence (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Evidence.citeAs[x]` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Evidence.citeAs[x]` 0..1 `markdown, Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Citation)`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `Evidence.citeAs[x]` 0..1 `markdown, Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Citation)`
*  R4B: `Evidence.citeAs[x]` 0..1 `markdown, Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Citation)`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Evidence.citeAs[x]` has a context of Evidence based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Evidence`.
Element `Evidence.citeAs[x]` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.comment:
Element `Evidence.citeAs[x]` has a context of Evidence based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Evidence`.
Element `Evidence.citeAs[x]` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.definition: Citation Resource or display of suggested citation for this evidence.
